Container.Name: ai-matrix-bot
Container.Overview: Private Matrix assistant powered by Codex, with encrypted DMs, threads, persistent memory, files, web tools, image generation, and per-conversation shell workspaces.
Container.Requires: A dedicated Matrix bot account, either an access token or login/password, and one long Matrix encryption secret. Docling, OpenRouter, and Tavily are optional.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent Matrix sync and crypto state, SQLite databases, Codex authentication/configuration, home directory, and cache state.

Config.Name: User Files
Config.Description: Persistent Matrix uploads, generated files, and per-conversation shell workspaces.

Config.Name: Matrix Homeserver URL
Config.Description: Matrix client API base URL.

Config.Name: Matrix Owner User ID
Config.Description: Full MXID that owns and administers the allowlist.

Config.Name: Matrix Access Token
Config.Description: Authentication option 1: access token for the dedicated bot account. Leave blank when using login/password.

Config.Name: Matrix Login
Config.Description: Authentication option 2: bot MXID (recommended) or localpart. Use together with Matrix Password.

Config.Name: Matrix Password
Config.Description: Password used only to obtain a device access token. It is not written into appdata. Leave blank when using an access token.

Config.Name: Matrix Encryption Secret
Config.Description: Passphrase of at least 32 characters used for Matrix secret storage and identity recovery. Reuse it exactly after moving the bot.

Config.Name: Docling URL
Config.Description: Optional external Docling server for DOCX and low-text PDF extraction, for example http://192.168.1.10:5001.

Config.Name: OpenRouter API Key
Config.Description: Optional key for embeddings and retrieval vectors.

Config.Name: Tavily API Key
Config.Description: Optional key for web search and page extraction.

Config.Name: Global Concurrency
Config.Description: Maximum number of conversations running concurrently.

Config.Name: Batch Window
Config.Description: Milliseconds used to durably batch adjacent text and media.

Config.Name: Maximum Event Bytes
Config.Description: Maximum Matrix event size before Markdown output is split.

Config.Name: Codex Model
Config.Description: Codex app-server model for normal chat turns.

Config.Name: Codex Compaction Model
Config.Description: Codex model for memory compaction and image descriptions.

Config.Name: Codex Image Model
Config.Description: Codex image-generation model.

Config.Name: Codex Image Quality
Config.Description: Default image-generation quality: low, medium, high, or auto.

Config.Name: Codex Speed Mode
Config.Description: Codex service tier mode: standard or fast.

Config.Name: Codex Verbosity
Config.Description: Codex model output verbosity: low, medium, or high.

Config.Name: Codex Turn Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for one Codex turn. Set to 0 to disable the hard cap.

Config.Name: Codex Image Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for an image-generation turn.

Config.Name: Reasoning Effort
Config.Description: Reasoning effort for normal chat turns.

Config.Name: Reasoning Summary
Config.Description: Reasoning summary verbosity.

Config.Name: OpenRouter Embedding Model
Config.Description: OpenRouter embedding model for retrieval vectors.

Config.Name: Context Warning Ratio
Config.Description: Usable context fraction that triggers context-limit handling.

Config.Name: Docling Timeout
Config.Description: Docling conversion timeout in milliseconds.

Config.Name: Bash Timeout
Config.Description: Maximum milliseconds for one virtual shell execution.

Config.Name: Bash Maximum Output
Config.Description: Maximum characters returned for each shell stdout or stderr stream.

Config.Name: Recent Window Messages
Config.Description: Newest messages preserved verbatim when compacting a conversation.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Minimum logger level: debug, info, warn, or error.
